case_id: Sugarloaf Mountain to Flagstaff Mountain, Boulder County, CO

pi_items.source: Calculated via Haversine formula using verified summit coordinates
Topographic analysis of the Front Range foothills

privileged_info_summary: The summit of Sugarloaf Mountain is located at [40.0266, -105.4188] and Flagstaff Mountain is at [40.0014, -105.3073]. The distance between these summits is approximately 10.1 km. The elevation of Flagstaff Mountain is 2,128 meters and Sugarloaf Mountain is 2,718 meters. A direct line of sight between these points is expected to be obstructed by the intervening terrain of the Front Range foothills.
